archetypes.name: The First Curse
archetypes.desc:
- Purestrain Genestealers units can be taken as Troops.
- The army must take one Patriarch.
- Only Purestrain Genestealers units count towards the 25% Troops limitation.

archetypes.name: Outlander Claw
archetypes.desc:
- Atalan Jackals can be taken as Troops.
- Outflanking units may be deployed on turn 1.
- All units with less than 12" Movement must start the game as passengers inside a transport.
- Units that have no transport option and less than 12" Movement cannot be taken at all.

legacies.name: Legacy of Chancer's Vale
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Last Gasp" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Legacy of Feinminster Gamma
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Broodvolt Surge" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Legacy of New Gidlam
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Synaptic Blast" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Legacy of Newseam
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Inescapable Decay" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Legacy of the Trysst Dynasty
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Undermine" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Legacy of Vejovium III
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Mutagenic Deviation" psychic power in addition.

traits.name: Agile Guerillas
traits.desc: The model may shoot "Heavy" weapons with a -1 penalty and "Rapid Fire" weapons at full range with a "Move & Shoot" command

traits.name: Alien Fury
traits.desc: If the unit uses a Charge order or gets charged by an enemy unit, it gains +1 to melee hit rolls until the end of the current battle round.

traits.name: Cyborgised Hybrids
traits.desc: Creature models gain a 6+ invulnerability save. Only for creature models that do not already have an invulnerability save from their datasheet or Armory.

traits.name: Deep Supplies
traits.desc: The unit can re-roll one armor penetration or wound roll per activation.

traits.name: Devoted Zealots
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Blind Rage" ability.

traits.name: Hunter's Instincts
traits.desc: The unit gains a cumulative +1 bonus to armor save rolls while benefitting from cover.

traits.name: Martial
traits.desc: The unit may re-roll ranged to hit rolls of 1 with Assault, Pistol and Rapid Fire weapons.

traits.name: Nomadic Survivalists
traits.desc: The unit gains the the "Frenzy(1)" and "Haste(1) abilities.

traits.name: Splinter Cult
traits.desc: The army must select a second Legacy. Each model may only select items from one Legacy armory.

traits.name: Subterranean Ambushers
traits.desc: You may set up one additional "Ambush Marker" in Skirmishes, two additional markers in Pitched Battles, and three additional markers in Epic Battles.

traits.name: Synaptic Resonance
traits.desc: The model can re-roll one psychic test per activation. Psykers only.

traits.name: Toxin Agents
traits.desc: The unit's melee attacks gain the "Poison(4+) ability.

traits.name: War Convoy
traits.desc: Vehicles repair either one Engine Damage or Weapon Damage on themselves during each Rally phase.
